seoTitle: How to Add a Signature in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to set up an email signature in Freshdesk so your replies look consistent and professional every time.
intro: A signature adds a professional finishing touch to every reply your agents send. This guide shows how to set up an email signature in Freshdesk.

steps.heading: Open your profile or agent settings
steps.body: Go to your personal settings or the admin panel if setting a signature for the whole team.

steps.heading: Find the signature section
steps.body: Locate the field for email signature configuration, typically near email or notification settings.

steps.heading: Design the signature
steps.body: Add your name, title, and any branding elements, using formatting options if Freshdesk supports rich text signatures.

steps.heading: Save and test
steps.body: Save the signature and send a test reply to confirm it appears correctly at the bottom of your emails.

faq.question: Can each agent have a different signature?
faq.answer: Yes, agents can typically set their own personal signature in their individual profile settings.

faq.question: Can I set a signature for the whole team at once?
faq.answer: Admins can often configure a default team-wide signature template that individual agents can customize.

faq.question: Does the signature support images or logos?
faq.answer: Depending on your Freshdesk plan and email client compatibility, signatures can often include images and logos.

faq.question: Will the signature appear on every reply automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, once set up, the signature should be added automatically to outgoing replies.
